overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity depicting a French Revolution-era Parisian square. The clip shows an assassin character in elaborate period attire standing among revolutionary crowds and wooden barricades, then walking down a cobblestone street lined with neoclassical stone architecture.

agents.ego_description: standing stationary in the square, surveying the revolutionary crowd and wooden barricades while turning slightly to observe surroundings

entered.detail: grand stone building with tall Corinthian columns and arched windows dominating the background
ornate black lamppost with decorative scrollwork in the immediate foreground
pile of wooden crates, barrels and debris forming a revolutionary street barricade

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a historic Parisian square during the French Revolution, surrounded by moderate crowds of NPCs in period clothing. The grand neoclassical palace facade dominates the background while a wooden barricade blocks part of the street. The atmosphere is hazy with revolutionary activity.

events.description: character turns 180 degrees and begins walking forward down the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the crowded street, navigating between groups of revolutionaries and passing the wooden barricades

notable_agents.action: man in blue patterned coat walking alongside the character before falling behind

entered.detail: view extending down the cobblestone street with distant crowds and buildings
continuous row of historic stone townhouses with mansard roofs lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking down the cobblestone street, moving away from the palace square. The camera follows from behind as the character navigates through moderate crowds of revolutionaries. The wooden barricade passes by on the right while new classical buildings come into view down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a static view of a revolutionary gathering in a grand square to a forward journey down a bustling Parisian street. It begins with the character standing amidst crowds of NPCs in period clothing, framed by a towering neoclassical palace facade and a wooden barricade under a hazy atmosphere. As the character starts to move, the camera follows from behind, gliding away from the palace and navigating through the revolutionaries. The scene then shifts as the wooden barricade passes by on the right, opening up the view to a cobblestone street lined with new classical buildings. The movement finally carries the character deeper into the city, leaving the open square behind for the narrower corridor of the urban landscape.
